---
pagetitle: "找不到頁面 | Yueswater Blog"
lang: zh-TW
page-layout: custom
sidebar: false
search: false
repo-actions: false
description: "這個頁面不存在。"
---

```{=html}
<div style="
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  min-height: 60vh;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 2rem;
  gap: 1rem;
">
  <p style="font-size: 6rem; font-weight: 700; margin: 0; line-height: 1;">404</p>
  <p style="font-size: 1.25rem; color: #666; margin: 0;">找不到這個頁面</p>
  <p style="font-size: 0.95rem; color: #999; margin: 0;">可能是連結錯了，或是這頁已經不存在了。</p>
  <a href="/" style="
    margin-top: 1rem;
    padding: 0.6rem 1.5rem;
    background: #181818;
    color: #f2f2f2;
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    border-radius: 4px;
  ">回首頁</a>
</div>
```
